synthesis: Mobius closed the cycle in green posture with GI at 0.81, while the 24-hour heartbeat band ran 0.64-0.90 and the latest heartbeat trend was volatile. The ledger registered 9 events over the last 24 hours, split between 5 merge events and 4 ZEUS verification events. Institutional was the strongest visible domain signal at 0.926, but ZEUS remains disputed and the live micro lane carried 12 stressed instruments. Forward signal: Watch whether infrastructure and financial drag keeps pulling against the stronger institutional lane, especially across data.gov, UN/OECD, FRED, and terminal health inputs.
